news.title: Sentry’s David Cramer on bootstrapping a unicorn

news.title: Sentry, Co-Founded by a Former Dropbox Engineer, Raised $40 Million
news.snippet: When Sentry CEO and co-founder David Cramer first started creating his error monitoring software, he felt like it was "two full time jobs.".
